name: Pumpkin Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Equal parts peeled pumpkin (e.g., butternut or acorn squash)
Equal parts peeled bacon, cut into slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil equal parts of peeled potatoes and pumpkin in salted water until tender.
2. Drain the cooked vegetables, then mash them together with a piece of butter.
3. Add the finely chopped onion and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Serve with golden slices of fried bacon.
